name: 24"x32" XL Abstract Beach Wall Art - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Spruce up your home or office walls with this XL Abstract Beach Wall Art from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Housed in a polystyrene frame with a brown finish, this XL vertical artwork features a striking beach landscape to create a serene atmosphere in any room. Equipped with a sawtooth back for easy hanging, this wall art in a neutral color tone works great with any decor style or color palette.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
